ham: Hey, just a quick update: our broadband engineer will visit today at 3 PM to check the router and speed. He'll fix any issues on the spot. Let me know if this time works for you.
spam: URGENT: PAN card link karna bahut zaroori hai. Agar ab tak link nahi kiya, to aapka account block ho sakta hai. Please <URL> now to link your PAN directly. This is final warning. Reply YES to confirm.
